name: Hogan's Alley
about:
Hogan's Alley is a premium indoor golf training facility led by Landon Decker, a PGA Professional and Director of Instruction with over two decades of experience. The studio is equipped with Trackman radar technology, video analysis tools, and top-tier training aids designed to help golfers improve their swing mechanics and overall performance. It serves as a high-tech environment for serious skill development while offering a welcoming atmosphere for players of all levels.

In addition to individual coaching and studio rentals, Hogan's Alley offers comprehensive club fitting and repair services. As a TaylorMade staff professional and a Master Club Repair Technician, Landon provides custom fittings and precision equipment tweaks to optimize a player's bag. The facility features a comfortable setting where golfers can practice on virtual courses from around the world or receive personalized instruction tailored to their specific needs.
why_golfers_like_it: Trackman radar technology for precise data analysis
Professional instruction from a PGA-certified coach with 20+ years experience
Custom club fitting by a TaylorMade staff professional
Studio rental availability for independent practice or entertainment
Full-service club repair and customization shop on-site
Welcoming atmosphere featuring facility dogs Hogan and Annie
amenities_list: Trackman Launch Monitor|Video Analysis|Club Repair|Custom Club Fitting|Golf Shop|Restrooms

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While bringing your own clubs is recommended for fitting purposes, the venue likely has rental options available if needed. It is best to contact them in advance to confirm availability.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The facility is a training studio. While specific policies aren't listed, most training-focused studios allow non-alcoholic beverages, but it is recommended to check with the staff regarding food.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: On a simulator, 18 holes typically takes about 45 to 60 minutes, depending on the pace of play and the software settings used.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Hogan's Alley is family-friendly. They feature a welcoming environment and a coach who works with students to improve their skills and have fun.
